description: Schema for per-repetition result JSON generated by the experiment runner for math tasks.

run_config.description: Identifies what ran: task, setup, role, model, repetition index.

task_id.description: Task identifier parsed from docs/tasks/<task>.md metadata.

task_type.description: Task type parsed from metadata (expected: math).

agent_role.description: Role used for the run (expert or beginner).

model.description: LLM model selected for this repetition (after task-level overrides).

is_hosted.description: True if the model was called via a hosted API (Ollama Cloud, Google), False for local Ollama. Reflected in the filename prefix hosted_.

task_path.description: Filesystem path to the task markdown used for this run.

sol_path.description: Filesystem path to the solution markdown with ground truth.

timing.description: Wall-clock timestamps and elapsed duration for the full repetition.

started_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the repetition started.

finished_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the repetition finished.

elapsed_seconds.description: Wall-clock elapsed seconds for the repetition.

agent.description: Agent outputs: all attempts in history, then the final selected answer.

attempts.description: Number of LLM calls within the repetition (1 = no retry needed).

history.description: Parsed agent responses for each attempt in order (answer, reasoning, confidence, elapsed_seconds, tokens_in, tokens_out).

final_answer.description: Agent response from the last attempt (answer, reasoning, confidence).

judge.description: Deterministic correctness check against the numeric ground truth.

verdict.description: Correctness verdict: correct if |answer - ground_truth| <= epsilon, else wrong.

delta.description: Absolute difference between agent answer and ground truth.

note.description: Human-readable description of the check result.

resources.description: Token usage for the repetition (agent call only; judge tokens are null for math tasks).

tokens.description: Token counts from Ollama; null if the provider did not return them.

agent_in.description: Prompt tokens consumed by the agent call.

agent_out.description: Completion tokens produced by the agent call.

judge_in.description: Always null for math tasks (no LLM judge is called).

judge_out.description: Always null for math tasks (no LLM judge is called).
